get.description: Simple health check endpoint used for readiness/liveness probes.

post.description: Create a new user account.
Authenticate a user and establish a session via cookie.
Invalidate the current session and clear the cookie.
Reset a user's password directly without an email link.

schema.title: Response Reset Password Auth Reset Post

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user.

post.description:
Bootstrap a new UserProfile for the authenticated user.

Creates the master profile record. Call this once before using any section endpoints.

Returns:
    The newly created profile (id, user_id, created_at).

Raises:
    HTTPException(409): If a profile already exists for this user.
    HTTPException(401): If not authenticated.

get.description:
Get personal details for the authenticated user's profile.

Returns:
    The personal_details row.

Raises:
    HTTPException(404): If personal details have not been set yet.
    HTTPException(401): If not authenticated.

patch.description:
Create or partially update personal details for the authenticated user's profile.

If personal details don't exist yet and all required fields (full_name, email,
linkedin_url) are provided, creates a new record (upsert). Otherwise, performs
a partial update on the existing record.

Returns:
    The upserted or updated personal_details row.

Raises:
    HTTPException(404): If the profile or personal details do not exist.
    HTTPException(401): If not authenticated.

get.description:
Get a summary of all profile sections for the authenticated user.

Returns:
    Counts/existence flags for all profile sections.

Raises:
    HTTPException(401): If not authenticated.
List all education entries for the authenticated user's profile.

schema.title: Response List Educations Profile Education Get

get.description: Get a single education entry by id.

the provided list. Send an empty list to clear all skills.

post.description: Import a LinkedIn profile, replacing all user_profile sections.

422.description: Invalid LinkedIn URL or unprocessable profile data

502.description: Apify upstream error (bad credentials, quota, empty result)

503.description: Service unavailable (missing API token, transient upstream)

post.description:
Enqueue a new extraction run. Returns 202 Accepted.

Returns 409 if a run is already in-flight.

Response List Experience Job Openings  Opening Id  Resume Experience Get
Response List Projects Job Openings  Opening Id  Resume Projects Get
Response List Research Job Openings  Opening Id  Resume Research Get
Response List Certifications Job Openings  Opening Id  Resume Certifications Get
Response List Skills Job Openings  Opening Id  Resume Skills Get

post.description:
Start a new agent run for an opening. Returns 202 Accepted.

Returns 409 if an agent run is already in progress.

get.description:
SSE endpoint for streaming agent events.

Polls the agent_runs table and yields new events as SSE messages.
Includes a heartbeat every 5 seconds.
Get the current agent status for an opening.
List all agent runs for an opening, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Agent Runs Job Openings  Opening Id  Agent Runs Get

post.description:
Start a new email agent run for an opening. Returns 202 Accepted.

Returns 409 if an email agent run is already in progress.

get.description:
SSE endpoint for streaming email agent events.

Polls the email_agent_runs table and yields new events as SSE messages.
Includes a heartbeat every 5 seconds.
Get the current email agent status for an opening.
List all email agent runs for an opening, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Email Agent Runs Job Openings  Opening Id  Email Agent Runs Get

post.description:
Resume a paused email agent run after human-in-the-loop edits.

Accepts user_edits in the request body, updates the run state,
and resumes graph execution.

schema.title: Response Resume Email Agent Job Openings  Opening Id  Email Agent Resume Post

get.description: Get the final output from the latest succeeded email agent run.
